item.title: Version 2026.03.20
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.20

  • Reverted to Whisper medium model — large-v3-turbo injects foreign-language text (e.g. Dutch, Korean) into English transcriptions mid-sentence. The medium model does not exhibit this cross-language hallucination. Streaming mode disabled again (medium's decoder is too slow for real-time).
  • Sparkle auto-update signing — replaced `codesign --deep` with inside-out signing (XPC services → Updater.app → framework → app). Fixes "improperly signed" validation errors on update. Added notarization status check to fail fast on rejection.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
